name: sigrank
description: Ranks AI coding operators by token cascade efficiency (Yield = cache_read × output / input²). 15 tools for yield calculation, leaderboard queries, operator lookups, local token usage pulls, and signed submission. Privacy-first: runs locally, only four token counts leave the machine.

SIGRANK_API_BASE.title: SigRank API Base URL
SIGRANK_API_BASE.description: Overrides the board host for the SigRank API. Defaults to https://signalaf.com.
